---
title : "Exploring {{ICCS}} 2016 to Measure Progress toward Target 4.7 - {{UNESCO Digital Library}}"
date : "2018-01-01"
author : "Sandoval-Hernandez & Miranda, Daniel"
categories : ["Report"]
publication : " "
publication_short : " "
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Sandoval-Hernandez & Miranda, Daniel (2018). *Exploring {{ICCS}} 2016 to Measure Progress toward Target 4.7 - {{UNESCO Digital Library}}*.  

:::
